subtasks.subtask: Add "Generate Full Report" button trong popup footer
Style button appropriately
Position button in footer layout
Test button displays correctly
Add click handler to button
Use `chrome.tabs.create()` to open new tab
Construct report URL
Open new tab với report URL
Get current coin name từ analysis data
Add coin name as query parameter: `?coin=BTC` hoặc `?coinName=Bitcoin`
Add other context if needed (symbol, etc.)
Construct complete URL với query params
Test report page opens với correct URL
Verify report page loads coin data from query params
Test report page displays analysis correctly
Test với different coins
Handle errors khi opening new tab fails
Handle errors khi report URL is invalid
Display error message to user
Provide error recovery options

acceptanceCriteria.ac: Button click opens new tab với report URL
Report URL includes coin context (query params)
Report page (frontend) loads với correct coin data
Error handling nếu report generation fails

doc.title: Epic 12: Popup UI & Shared Components Integration
Story 12.2: Popup Layout & Structure
doc.snippet: Footer với action buttons ready. Button can be added to footer.

doc.title: Story 12.4: React Query Integration
doc.snippet: Analysis data available via React Query hook. Can get coin name/symbol from analysis data.

dependencies.prerequisite: Story 12.4: React Query integration must be complete (analysis data available)
Story 12.2: Popup layout với footer must be created

constraints.constraint: Report URL must include coin context (query params)
Chrome tabs API requires `tabs` permission in manifest

testing.test: Test button displays và is clickable
Test new tab opens với report URL
